THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIXON,RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG,LAURA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00, IT IS ORDERED THAT LEE MAY-HWA DIXON, A MINOR, BE SUBSTITUTED AS PROPER PARTY PLFT BY & THROUGH HER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
